title: Podman errors with unset env variables
body:
**kind bug**

**Description**

Podman errors out when unset environment variables are specified (e.g., via `podman run -e`). I found the issue by running `make shell` on my machine.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman run -e FOO --rm alpine ls`

**Describe the results you received:**

unable to process environment variables: environment variable "FOO" does not exist

**Describe the results you expected:**

Podman should ignore the env variable (as Docker does).

comments.body:
Digging through Moby code, I found other issues that we should fix: https://github.com/moby/moby/issues/25099#issuecomment-329426895

I'll wrap up a PR.
